global.description: The ad features a prominent logo and a clear call to action with a visually engaging background.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to win rewards with no ads in the first week.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: GlitchWave logo
elements.description: A bold, stylized text logo that reads 'GlitchWave' in a prominent font at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Background shapes
elements.description: Geometric shapes in a light color that create a visually interesting background pattern behind the logo.

elements.label: Icon placeholders
elements.description: Four empty square icons arranged in a grid, suggesting potential app features or rewards.

elements.label: Main headline
